items.name: theme
items.description: Editable semantic light and dark design tokens.

items.name: surface
items.description: Semantic default, card, muted, and popover surfaces.

items.name: alert
items.description: Composable default, success, warning, and destructive notices.

items.name: button
items.description: Button with six variants, four sizes, and disabled states.

items.name: input
items.description: Text input with default and invalid states.

items.name: textarea
items.description: Focusable native text editor with default and invalid states.

items.name: checkbox
items.description: Styled native checkbox with active, hovered, and disabled states.

items.name: field
items.description: Visible labels with optional help or error text around native controls.

items.name: card
items.description: Composable card container and header.

items.name: badge
items.description: Compact labels and status pills with six variants and two sizes.

items.name: empty
items.description: Centered empty state with optional leading content and visible copy.

items.name: progress
items.description: Semantic visual progress bars with bounded percentage input.

items.name: separator
items.description: Horizontal and vertical semantic separators.

items.name: segmented-control
items.description: Controlled pointer and touch selector built from native buttons.

items.name: aspect-ratio
items.description: Responsive content constrained to a caller-selected aspect ratio.

items.name: avatar
items.description: Circular caller-owned image/content frame with text fallback and three sizes.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.description: Path items with caller-owned navigation controls and separators.

items.name: item
items.description: Content row with optional leading visual, description, and trailing action.

items.name: kbd
items.description: Semantic visual key cap for keyboard shortcut copy.

items.name: label
items.description: Consistent visible label text for native controls.

items.name: pagination
items.description: Controlled previous, page, ellipsis, and next navigation items.

items.name: skeleton
items.description: Static reduced-motion-safe loading placeholder with native dimensions.

items.name: typography
items.description: Theme-backed heading, paragraph, lead, small, muted, and code roles.

items.name: attachment
items.description: Composable file row with visible name, metadata, and caller-owned controls.

items.name: bubble
items.description: Incoming and outgoing conversational surfaces with side alignment.

items.name: button-group
items.description: Horizontal and vertical groups preserving caller-owned control actions.

items.name: direction
items.description: Explicit LTR/RTL alignment and reading-order helpers for iced layouts.

items.name: input-group
items.description: Shared-border leading, input, and trailing control composition.

items.name: marker
items.description: Default, bordered, and separated conversation markers with visible labels.

items.name: message
items.description: Incoming/outgoing message composition for caller-owned avatar, body, and actions.

items.name: message-scroller
items.description: Bottom-anchored native transcript viewport with caller-owned follow state.

items.name: scroll-area
items.description: Styled native scrollable retaining direction, size, and scroll callbacks.

items.name: spinner
items.description: Controlled indeterminate indicator with reduced-motion support.

items.name: table
items.description: Styled native table, columns, cells, caption, and frame helpers.

items.name: accordion
items.description: Controlled single/multiple disclosure state, items, and navigation helpers.

items.name: collapsible
items.description: Controlled trigger/content disclosure with explicit state transitions.

items.name: combobox
items.description: Searchable keyboard-capable native combo box with semantic menu styling.

items.name: native-select
items.description: Styled controlled native pick list with documented iced interaction limits.

items.name: data-table
items.description: Headless sort/filter/pagination state composed with table controls.

items.name: focus-control
items.description: Focusable pointer, touch, Enter, and Space activation shell for passive content.

items.name: calendar
items.description: Controlled six-week month grid with validated Gregorian date state.

items.name: carousel
items.description: Controlled bounded or wrapping slide state, viewport, and keyboard command reducer.
